name: Center Silk Reference in Courtyard
description: Moves every F/B.Silkscreen reference to its courtyard centroid with rotation, pad nudging and text scaling.
description_full:
KiCad 9.0 action plugin that moves every footprint's silkscreen reference designator to the centroid of its courtyard bounding box.

Features: settings dialog, scope control (all or selected), side filter (front/back/both), rotation control (match footprint, always 0°, or keep existing), auto text scale-down to fit courtyard, pad collision nudging, back-side support (B.Courtyard / B.Silkscreen), single undo transaction, optional CSV export of skipped footprints.
